topic: A person unboxing the latest iPhone 16 Pro in Desert Titanium on a wooden table, front view.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Hands approach and lift the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro box from the wooden table — front view
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Lid opens to reveal the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro in its box — close-up
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Phone fully unboxed and placed on the wooden table, Desert Titanium finish facing up — top-down
parsed_generation.narration: A single subject unboxes the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro on a wooden table. The sequence moves from box interaction to a close reveal and ends with a top-down view of the device.

feedback:
The script stays on-topic and maintains a clear unboxing focus on the Desert Titanium iPhone 16 Pro on a wooden table. However, it diverges from the gold standard in shot variety and sequencing (fewer shots, no macro peel or cable/documentation reveal). To better match the reference, add an initial top-down sealed-box shot, include a side-angle lift showing the device and any accompanying items, and insert a macro shot of peeling the screen protector with corresponding timestamps and audio cues.
